title: Chenopodiopsis hirta
taxonomy: Chenopodiopsis hirta is a species of flowering plant in the family Amaranthaceae. It is a member of the genus Chenopodiopsis. The classification of Chenopodiopsis hirta is as follows: it is a dicotyledonous plant, belonging to the class Magnoliopsida. Within the class Magnoliopsida, it is classified as an order Caryophyllales. This classification reflects its botanical relationship to other plants in the Amaranthaceae family.
